training.sentence: Focus on your breathing during the drill.
training.meaning: Pay attention to how you breathe while doing the exercise.
training.grammar_focus: Focus on + noun describes what to pay attention to.

vocabulary.meaning: moving air in and out of the body

training.example: Focus on your timing during the song.

matches.sentence: Our team played well in the second half.
matches.meaning: The team performed well after halftime.
matches.grammar_focus: Past simple describes a completed past action.

vocabulary.meaning: the later part of a game

matches.example: She worked hard in the final hour.

coaching.sentence: Move into space after you pass.
coaching.meaning: After passing the ball, go to an open area.
coaching.grammar_focus: After + subject + verb shows action order.

vocabulary.meaning: go from one place to another

coaching.example: Close the door after you leave.
